svg.text: Example: reading a real product end-to-end
Covers medical / morbidity risk — distinct from pure life (mortality) cover
Annual renewable contract; filed under IRDAI general insurance rules;
Single policyholder; IRDAI individual health filing category;
drives how premium and claims are reported
Reimburses actual hospitalisation costs up to sum insured;
not a fixed benefit / defined benefit plan
Marketed to working-age individuals; bundled OPD, maternity, and
restoration benefits; sold through brokers and direct channel
